title: lepidotis cernua
intro: Lepidotis cernua, also known as the nodding or nodding wood-sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Oxalidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, and has been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Lepidotis cernua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
